summary.lv: Application Support Analyst globālā fintech uzņēmumā, kas izmeklē sarežģītus atbalsta pieprasījumus, analizē datu problēmas un koordinē to novēršanu ar iekšējiem partneriem.
summary.en: Application Support Analyst at a global fintech company investigating complex support tickets, diagnosing data issues through SQL queries, and coordinating resolution with internal stakeholders.
